data.title: Encryption Protocols
data.description: Employs robust encryption to protect data at rest and in transit, ensuring user privacy.
data.technical_spec: Uses TLS for data transmission and AES for storage encryption.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Strict control of user identities and permissions for both consumer and developer access.
data.technical_spec: Employs multi-factor authentication and role-based access controls.

data.title: Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) Protection
data.description: Utilizes advanced measures to prevent and mitigate DDoS attacks, ensuring service availability.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates traffic filtering and rate limiting at network edges.

data.title: Continuous Security Monitoring
data.description: Maintains continuous surveillance of the operating environment to detect and respond to anomalies.
data.technical_spec: Deploys automated systems for threat detection and incident response.

data.title: Security Compliance
data.description: Adheres to international security standards to ensure data security and user trust.
data.technical_spec: Regular compliance with standards like ISO 27001 and GDPR.
